name: Cooley-Tukey radix-2 FFT
task: Create /tmp/eval_fft/fft.py with fft(x) returning the discrete Fourier transform of x (a list of complex/real numbers). Length must be a power of 2; raise ValueError otherwise. Implement Cooley-Tukey radix-2 recursively with twiddle factor exp(-2*pi*i*k/N).

validation.script:
import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_fft/fft.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); o = mod.fft([1,0,0,0]); assert all(abs(v - 1) < 1e-9 for v in o); o2 = mod.fft([1,1,1,1]); assert abs(o2[0] - 4) < 1e-9
for v in o2[1:]: assert abs(v) < 1e-9
inp = [0,1,2,3,4,5,6,7]; o3 = mod.fft(inp); assert abs(o3[0] - sum(inp)) < 1e-9
try: mod.fft([1,2,3])
except ValueError: pass
else: raise AssertionError
print('OK')
